summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: horizontal air/glass interface with n_1=1.0, n_2=1.5. ValueTracker th1_tr sweeps incident angle through 10°, 45°, 60°, 80°, 30°; always_redraw YELLOW incoming arrow + ORANGE refracted arrow (Snell-computed θ_2) + angle arcs + dashed normal. Live panel shows both angles and the invariant n_1 sin θ_1 = n_2 sin θ_2.
